_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to prioritize how Operating System (OS) and application patches are distributed in different systems
reference_document_element_description: Ability to diagnose and resolve technical issues that span multiple system layers, tracing problems across application code, data pipelines, databases, networks, and infrastructure to identify and remediate root causes.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI TF domain. TF-A-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-S-007 (DA, cosine: 0.435), AI-K-023 (AI, cosine: 0.430).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.8/10 (raw 0.282). Shared vocabulary: [ability, application, system]. DCWF-only terms [different, distributed, operating, os, patches, prioritize] vs WIDAI-only terms [across, causes, code, data, databases, diagnose] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.850 (P=0.861, R=0.840). P exceeds R by 0.022 — the DCWF element's 15 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 29 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:31.7%, N:68.3%, C:0.0%). No dominant classification for "Ability to prioritize how Operating System (OS) and application patches are dist" vs "Ability to diagnose and resolve technical issues that span multiple system layer" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.490 > STS 0.282 (gap +0.207). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [ability, application, system] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.9%. Shared tokens: [ability, application, system]. DCWF-only: [different, distributed, operating, os, patches, prioritize]. WIDAI-only: [across, causes, code, data, databases, diagnose].

signals.detail: Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.207 with low STS 0.282. Candidate selection was likely driven by shared vocabulary rather than functional alignment. The functionally correct KSA may not have been in the top-5 candidates.
